title: LEND $HYPE with @hyperlendx
summary_title: HyperLend brings portfolio margin to Hyperliquid EVM with yield-bearing perps
summary_description: New lending protocol enables collateralized perpetuals, 50-60% looping yields, and tokenized strategies on Hyper EVM.

key_moments.label: Ness introduces HyperLend as first lending protocol on Hyper EVM
Vision: collateralize HLP vault, enable BTC/ETH as collateral for perp trades
HyperLend already live on mainnet with 30M TVL cap, lending and borrowing HYPE
Long-term goal: portfolio margin infrastructure, positioning as DeFi banking layer
Precompiles unlock yield-bearing perpetuals: deposit perps as collateral, borrow against pnl
Looping strategies projected to generate 50-60% yield on stablecoins or volatile assets
Governance token with revenue share utility confirmed via points system
Focus on UX, community testing, and usefulness over points farming

pull_quote: We're going to be that banking infrastructure on the EVM side. Think of it as Hyperliquid being Robinhood, and we're Chase.
